attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
DEAL_ID /*TRX.IDE_IFC_IDE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID */
,CISCO_BOOKED_DATE 
,SALES_ORDER_NUMBER        
,TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,OPERATION
,COALESCE(SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,-9999) AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
,ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT */
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT */
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT */
,COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT/1),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT),0) AS SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT),0) AS SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT),0)  AS SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,EDW_CREATE_USER
,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DEAL_CON_INC_AGR_SLS_ADJ_1
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,21,22,23,24

SELECT
 RBK.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID /*TRX.IDE_IFC_IDE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID */
,'1900/01/01' AS CISCO_BOOKED_DATE 
,CASE WHEN NSO1.BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT IS NULL THEN -9999 ELSE  NSO1.BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT END  SALES_ORDER_NUMBER        
,'USD' AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  
,'SLS_ADJ' AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,'NEW' AS OPERATION
,COALESCE(RBK.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,-9999) AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  /* TRX.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE .. ?? */
--,COALESCE(CAST(RBK.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE    /* or RBK.ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_ORDER_DT or RBK.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT  ... ?? */
,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT),0) AS ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT */
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT */
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT),0) AS ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  /* DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT */
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/1),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN TRX.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/1) /* doubt :: TRX.CONVERSION_RT=1 always for SLS_ADJ */
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/1) /* doubt :: TRX.CONVERSION_RT=1 always for SLS_ADJ */
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN TRX.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/1) /* doubt :: TRX.CONVERSION_RT=1 always for SLS_ADJ */
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT) 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/1) /* doubt :: TRX.CONVERSION_RT=1 always for SLS_ADJ */
	END       ),0)  AS SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
--,MAX(TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,INCR1.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(SELECT    BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT 
FROM $$NRTNCRVWdb.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NRT TRX
WHERE  /*TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE') */ TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'  
GROUP BY 1
) INCR   /* WI_ERP_INCR */
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWdb.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NRT TRX
ON INCR.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT =TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
CROSS JOIN 
(SELECT MAX(EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 
FROM (SELECT EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$NRTNCRVWdb.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NRT TRX GROUP BY 1) A) INCR1
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWdb.N_SLS_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX_NRT RBK
ON RBK.MANUAL_TRX_KEY = TRX.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWdb.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH
ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWdb.N_DEAL NSO  ON 
RBK.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID = NSO.BK_DEAL_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$NRTNCRVWdb.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT 
	WHERE SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
		AND SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME          <> 'RETURN'
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT ORDER BY ORDER_DTM DESC, SO_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM DESC) = 1
	)NSO1 
ON NSO1.BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT =TRX.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_LINT 
AND SS_CD ='CG'
WHERE 1=1   
AND (RBK.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND RBK.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID NOT IN ('UNKNOWN'))
AND RSH.L1_SALEs_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW Distribution')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,21,22,24
